Name: CSV Transform
Description: Transforms parsed CSV records using a template per row.

SettingsInputs.Name: SourceAddress
SettingsInputs.Description: State address of the records array

SettingsInputs.Name: Destination
SettingsInputs.Description: State address to store transformed records

SettingsInputs.Name: FieldMapping
SettingsInputs.Description: JSON array of field mappings [{From, To, Template}]

SettingsInputs.Name: OutputFields
SettingsInputs.Description: JSON array of field names to include in output
